name: Borobudur
short_description_id: Candi Buddha megah dengan relief bersejarah.
short_description_en: A grand Buddhist temple with historic relief panels.
description_id: Borobudur menawarkan arsitektur kuno, panorama bukit, dan pengalaman budaya yang kuat untuk perjalanan keluarga maupun pecinta sejarah.
description_en: Borobudur offers ancient architecture, hill views, and a rich cultural experience for families and history lovers.
activities_id: Menjelajah relief, sunrise, museum, fotografi.
activities_en: Relief walks, sunrise, museum, photography.
travel_notes_id: Datang lebih awal dan siapkan topi serta air minum.
travel_notes_en: Arrive early and bring a hat and water.

name: Prambanan
short_description_id: Kompleks candi Hindu ikonik dekat Yogyakarta.
short_description_en: An iconic Hindu temple complex near Yogyakarta.
description_id: Prambanan cocok untuk wisata budaya, pertunjukan seni, dan perjalanan singkat dari pusat Yogyakarta.
description_en: Prambanan is ideal for culture trips, performing arts, and a short journey from central Yogyakarta.
activities_id: Tur candi, foto, pertunjukan Ramayana.
activities_en: Temple tour, photos, Ramayana performance.
travel_notes_id: Gabungkan dengan itinerary kota Yogyakarta.
travel_notes_en: Pair it with a Yogyakarta city itinerary.

name: Mount Bromo
short_description_id: Gunung berapi dengan lautan pasir dan sunrise terkenal.
short_description_en: A volcano with a sand sea and famous sunrise.
description_id: Bromo adalah pilihan kuat untuk pencinta alam, petualangan ringan, dan pemandangan dramatis di Jawa Timur.
description_en: Bromo is a strong choice for nature lovers, light adventure, and dramatic East Java scenery.
activities_id: Sunrise, jeep tour, trekking ringan.
activities_en: Sunrise, jeep tour, light trekking.
travel_notes_id: Udara dingin; bawa jaket tebal.
travel_notes_en: It gets cold; bring a warm jacket.

name: Kawah Ijen
short_description_id: Danau kawah asam dengan fenomena api biru.
short_description_en: An acidic crater lake known for blue fire.
description_id: Kawah Ijen cocok untuk traveler aktif yang ingin trekking malam dan pemandangan vulkanik unik.
description_en: Kawah Ijen suits active travelers seeking night trekking and unique volcanic views.
activities_id: Trekking, melihat blue fire, fotografi.
activities_en: Trekking, blue fire viewing, photography.
travel_notes_id: Perlu stamina baik dan masker gas dari operator lokal.
travel_notes_en: Requires decent stamina and a gas mask from local operators.

name: Tangkuban Perahu
short_description_id: Kawah gunung berapi yang mudah dijangkau dari Bandung.
short_description_en: A volcanic crater easily reached from Bandung.
description_id: Destinasi ini pas untuk keluarga dan perjalanan singkat dengan suasana pegunungan.
description_en: This destination fits families and short mountain getaways.
activities_id: Melihat kawah, kuliner, belanja oleh-oleh.
activities_en: Crater viewing, food stops, souvenir shopping.
travel_notes_id: Akses mudah, tetapi akhir pekan bisa ramai.
travel_notes_en: Easy access, but weekends can be crowded.

name: Pantai Pangandaran
short_description_id: Pantai populer untuk keluarga, berenang, dan kuliner laut.
short_description_en: A popular beach for families, swimming, and seafood.
description_id: Pangandaran menawarkan pantai luas, aktivitas air, dan suasana liburan keluarga yang santai.
description_en: Pangandaran offers broad beaches, water activities, and a relaxed family holiday mood.
activities_id: Berenang, seafood, sunset, body rafting sekitar.
activities_en: Swimming, seafood, sunset, nearby body rafting.
travel_notes_id: Cek kondisi ombak sebelum berenang.
travel_notes_en: Check wave conditions before swimming.

name: Kota Tua Jakarta
short_description_id: Kawasan bersejarah dengan museum dan bangunan kolonial.
short_description_en: A historic district with museums and colonial buildings.
description_id: Kota Tua cocok untuk wisata sejarah, foto, dan eksplorasi singkat di Jakarta.
description_en: Kota Tua is great for history, photos, and a short Jakarta exploration.
activities_id: Museum, sepeda, foto arsitektur, kuliner.
activities_en: Museums, cycling, architecture photos, food.
travel_notes_id: Gunakan transportasi publik untuk menghindari macet.
travel_notes_en: Use public transport to avoid traffic.

name: Malioboro
short_description_id: Jalan ikonik untuk belanja, kuliner, dan suasana kota.
short_description_en: An iconic street for shopping, food, and city atmosphere.
description_id: Malioboro adalah pusat suasana Yogyakarta, cocok untuk wisata kuliner dan belanja oleh-oleh.
description_en: Malioboro captures Yogyakarta atmosphere, ideal for food walks and souvenir shopping.
activities_id: Belanja, kuliner, jalan kaki, foto malam.
activities_en: Shopping, food, walking, night photos.
travel_notes_id: Siapkan uang tunai kecil dan alas kaki nyaman.
travel_notes_en: Prepare small cash and comfortable shoes.

name: Dieng Plateau
short_description_id: Dataran tinggi dengan telaga, candi, dan udara sejuk.
short_description_en: A highland area with lakes, temples, and cool air.
description_id: Dieng cocok untuk pencinta alam dan budaya yang ingin suasana pegunungan tenang.
description_en: Dieng suits nature and culture lovers seeking calm mountain scenery.
activities_id: Sunrise, telaga warna, candi, kuliner lokal.
activities_en: Sunrise, colorful lake, temples, local food.
travel_notes_id: Jalan berkelok dan dingin; rencanakan transportasi.
travel_notes_en: Winding roads and cold air; plan transport.

name: Karimunjawa
short_description_id: Kepulauan tropis untuk snorkeling dan island hopping.
short_description_en: A tropical island chain for snorkeling and island hopping.
description_id: Karimunjawa pas untuk liburan pantai beberapa hari dengan ritme santai dan laut jernih.
description_en: Karimunjawa fits multi-day beach trips with a relaxed pace and clear water.
activities_id: Snorkeling, island hopping, pantai, seafood.
activities_en: Snorkeling, island hopping, beaches, seafood.
best_time_to_visit_en: Dry season when seas are calm.
travel_notes_id: Cek jadwal kapal dan cuaca sebelum berangkat.
travel_notes_en: Check ferry schedules and weather before leaving.

name: Ubud
short_description_id: Pusat seni, sawah, yoga, dan budaya Bali.
short_description_en: A center for Balinese art, rice fields, yoga, and culture.
description_id: Ubud ideal untuk wisata budaya, wellness, kuliner, dan suasana Bali yang lebih tenang.
description_en: Ubud is ideal for culture, wellness, food, and a calmer side of Bali.
activities_id: Sawah, galeri seni, yoga, kuliner, pura.
activities_en: Rice fields, art galleries, yoga, food, temples.
travel_notes_id: Sewa motor atau driver untuk menjangkau area sekitar.
travel_notes_en: Rent a scooter or driver to explore nearby areas.

name: Kuta Beach
short_description_id: Pantai ramai untuk sunset, surfing pemula, dan hiburan.
short_description_en: A lively beach for sunset, beginner surfing, and entertainment.
description_id: Kuta cocok untuk traveler yang ingin pantai mudah diakses dan suasana ramai.
description_en: Kuta suits travelers wanting an easy-access beach and lively atmosphere.
activities_id: Surfing pemula, sunset, kuliner, belanja.
activities_en: Beginner surfing, sunset, food, shopping.
travel_notes_id: Area ramai; jaga barang pribadi.
travel_notes_en: Busy area; watch your belongings.

name: Tanah Lot
short_description_id: Pura laut ikonik dengan panorama sunset.
short_description_en: An iconic sea temple with sunset views.
description_id: Tanah Lot sangat cocok untuk wisata budaya ringan dan foto pemandangan laut.
description_en: Tanah Lot is excellent for light cultural travel and ocean-view photos.
activities_id: Melihat pura, sunset, foto, pasar seni.
activities_en: Temple viewing, sunset, photos, art market.
travel_notes_id: Datang lebih awal untuk tempat foto yang nyaman.
travel_notes_en: Arrive early for comfortable photo spots.

name: Uluwatu
short_description_id: Pura tebing laut dengan tari Kecak dan sunset.
short_description_en: A cliffside sea temple with Kecak dance and sunset.
description_id: Uluwatu menawarkan kombinasi budaya, tebing dramatis, dan pantai sekitar yang indah.
description_en: Uluwatu combines culture, dramatic cliffs, and beautiful nearby beaches.
activities_id: Pura, tari Kecak, sunset, pantai tebing.
activities_en: Temple, Kecak dance, sunset, cliff beaches.
travel_notes_id: Pesan tiket Kecak lebih awal saat musim ramai.
travel_notes_en: Book Kecak tickets early in high season.

name: Nusa Penida
short_description_id: Pulau dengan tebing, pantai dramatis, dan laut biru.
short_description_en: An island with cliffs, dramatic beaches, and blue sea.
description_id: Nusa Penida cocok untuk petualangan pantai dan fotografi, terutama bila punya satu hari penuh atau lebih.
description_en: Nusa Penida suits beach adventure and photography, especially with a full day or more.
activities_id: Kelingking, snorkeling, pantai, viewpoint.
activities_en: Kelingking, snorkeling, beaches, viewpoints.
travel_notes_id: Jalan cukup menantang; gunakan driver lokal jika perlu.
travel_notes_en: Roads can be challenging; use a local driver if needed.

name: Sanur
short_description_id: Pantai tenang dengan sunrise dan jalur pejalan kaki.
short_description_en: A calm beach with sunrise and a seaside path.
description_id: Sanur pas untuk keluarga, pasangan, dan traveler yang mencari pantai lebih tenang.
description_en: Sanur fits families, couples, and travelers seeking a quieter beach.
activities_id: Sunrise, sepeda, kano, kuliner tepi pantai.
activities_en: Sunrise, cycling, canoeing, seaside food.
travel_notes_id: Cocok sebagai titik berangkat ke Nusa Penida.
travel_notes_en: Useful as a departure point to Nusa Penida.

name: Bedugul
short_description_id: Kawasan danau dan pegunungan dengan pura Ulun Danu.
short_description_en: A lake and mountain area with Ulun Danu temple.
description_id: Bedugul cocok untuk udara sejuk, kebun raya, dan wisata keluarga di Bali tengah.
description_en: Bedugul is great for cool air, botanical gardens, and family trips in central Bali.
activities_id: Pura danau, kebun raya, foto, piknik.
activities_en: Lake temple, botanical garden, photos, picnic.
travel_notes_id: Bawa jaket ringan karena udara lebih sejuk.
travel_notes_en: Bring a light jacket for cooler air.

name: Mount Batur
short_description_id: Gunung populer untuk trekking sunrise di Bali.
short_description_en: A popular mountain for sunrise trekking in Bali.
description_id: Mount Batur cocok untuk traveler aktif yang ingin pengalaman sunrise dan panorama kaldera.
description_en: Mount Batur suits active travelers seeking sunrise and caldera views.
activities_id: Trekking sunrise, hot spring, panorama danau.
activities_en: Sunrise trekking, hot springs, lake panorama.
travel_notes_id: Gunakan pemandu dan sepatu yang nyaman.
travel_notes_en: Use a guide and comfortable shoes.

name: Tirta Empul
short_description_id: Pura air suci untuk pengalaman budaya Bali.
short_description_en: A holy water temple for Balinese cultural experience.
description_id: Tirta Empul cocok untuk memahami tradisi Bali dengan suasana spiritual dan arsitektur pura.
description_en: Tirta Empul is good for understanding Balinese tradition through spiritual atmosphere and temple architecture.
activities_id: Melihat pura, ritual melukat, fotografi budaya.
activities_en: Temple viewing, purification ritual, cultural photography.
travel_notes_id: Hormati aturan pakaian dan area sembahyang.
travel_notes_en: Respect dress rules and prayer areas.

name: Garuda Wisnu Kencana
short_description_id: Taman budaya dengan patung raksasa GWK.
short_description_en: A cultural park with the giant GWK statue.
description_id: GWK cocok untuk keluarga, pertunjukan budaya, dan kunjungan mudah di Bali selatan.
description_en: GWK suits families, cultural shows, and an easy visit in south Bali.
activities_id: Patung GWK, pertunjukan budaya, foto, taman.
activities_en: GWK statue, cultural shows, photos, park walk.
travel_notes_id: Cek jadwal pertunjukan untuk kunjungan terbaik.
travel_notes_en: Check show schedules for the best visit.
